title: Walk-in Drive Category Manager at Nivea India

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Category Manager at Nivea India
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Category Manager with drive and ambition, Nivea India in Noida is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Nivea India:
Nivea India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Noida, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Nivea India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
